subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of the Truth! Thou art mentioned in the presence of the divine friends and art accepted in the gathering of spiritual companions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق در ساحت یاران الهی مذکوری و در انجمن دوستان معنوی مقبول از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
